business.name: Elite Painting
business.serviceArea: Bainbridge Island & North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake
business.about: A premium residential painting studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Obsessive prep, daily updates, and a five-year labor warranty on every interior and exterior project.

services.name: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, trim, and doors. Surfaces sanded, patched, caulked, and primed before a single stroke of finish coat. Two coats of premium paint, crisp lines, and a spotless job site every evening.

services.name: Exterior Painting
services.description: Full exterior — siding, trim, fascia, eaves, doors. Pressure-wash, scrape, prime bare wood, and seal with exterior-grade coatings engineered for Pacific Northwest weather.

services.name: Cabinet Refinishing
services.description: Kitchen and bath cabinets sanded, primed, and sprayed in our spray booth or on-site. A factory-smooth conversion-varnish finish at a fraction of the cost of new cabinetry.

services.name: Deck & Fence Staining
services.description: Deep-clean, sand, and restore decks, fences, and outdoor trim. Penetrating stains and solid-color coatings that survive Seattle drizzle and sun.

services.name: Light Commercial
services.description: Retail, restaurant, and small-office repaints scheduled around your operating hours. We keep the lights on and the customers in.

services.name: Custom Carpentry
services.description: Trim millwork, wainscoting, built-in benches, crown molding, and small repairs. Carpentry paired with paint so the finish is truly seamless.

testimonials.name: Clare T.
testimonials.text: They treated our floors like they were made of glass. Daily updates, obsessive prep, and a finish that actually looks expensive.

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: We'd been burned twice before hiring Elite. First contractor who showed up on time every single morning and left the job site cleaner than they found it.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.text: The cabinet refinish is two years old and still looks factory-new. Not a chip, not a scratch. The prep obviously paid off.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Color consultation alone was worth the price. They watched how the afternoon light hit our living room before recommending a shade.

process.title: Walkthrough
process.description: We visit, measure every surface, and build you a written quote with line-item scope. No high-pressure sales — just clarity.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: Prep is 90% of the job. We sand, patch, caulk, and prime with obsession. The paint is the easy part — the surface underneath is what lasts.

process.title: Protection
process.description: Your home isn't a job site. Floors covered daily, furniture moved and re-covered, tools stowed before we leave each evening.

process.title: Finish
process.description: Two coats of premium paint, cut lines inspected in daylight, final walkthrough with you before we pack up. Five-year labor warranty on everything we touch.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — I'm Elite Painting's virtual assistant. Tell me about the project and I'll give you a written ballpark in under a minute.
qualifyingQuestions: Roughly how many rooms or what's the exterior square footage?
When would you like the work completed?
chatbot.customInstructions: Anchor on quality and predictability, not speed or lowest price. Reference the 5-year warranty, daily updates, and obsessive prep. Mention Bainbridge Island and North Seattle service area when relevant.

persona.name: Sarah
persona.title: Office Manager
persona.proactiveBubbleText: Hi! Looking for a painting quote? Tell me about the project.

faqs.question: Do you do interior painting?
faqs.answer: Yes — interior walls, trim, ceilings, and cabinets. For those I'll grab your info and the team will call you with a quote.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: Bainbridge Island and North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake.

faqs.question: How long does an exterior job take?
faqs.answer: Most single-story homes take 2–4 days; two-story is 4–7 days depending on prep.

faqs.question: What paint brands do you use?
faqs.answer: Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore — Duration and Aura tiers for the best warranty.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, 0% APR for qualified customers up to 18 months through our partner.
